title: MultiTime
body: # MultiTime [![servers][1]][5] [![spigot-downloads][2]][6] [![modrinth-downloads][4]][7] Minecraft Server plugin for world specific time utilities A simple Plugin to set, get, lock and unlock time per world. Because when using [Multiverse][3], the default `/time` command affects all worlds. ## Usage - `/time set {ticks/day/noon/night/midnight} {world/all}` - `/time add {ticks} {world/all}` - `/time get {world/all}` - `/time lock {world/all}` - `/time unlock {world/all}` - The world parameter is always optional and defaults to the world the player is currently in. - You can subtract time by using `/time add` with a negative number - Locked worlds will still be affected by `/time set` or `/time add` ## Permissions - `multitime.admin` for all commands (default for ops) ## Questions or feedback? - Create an issue [here][10] ## See also - [MultiWeather][8] - [MultiChat][9] [1]: https://img.shields.io/bstats/servers/10918 [2]: https://img.shields.io/spiget/downloads/90642?label=spigot%20downloads&color=%23e2e83f [3]: https://dev.bukkit.org/projects/multiverse-core [4]: https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/Z5N7Q1Iz?label=modrinth%20downloads&color=%231bd96a [5]: https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/MultiTime/10918 [6]: https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/multitime.90642/ [7]: https://modrinth.com/plugin/multitime [8]: https://modrinth.com/plugin/multiweather [9]: https://modrinth.com/plugin/multichat2 [10]: https://codeberg.org/MaddinM/MultiPlugins/issues
